title: AI Policy Development & Implementation Cycle
description: A flowchart illustrating the cyclical process of developing, implementing, and refining ethical AI public policy, highlighting key stakeholder interactions and feedback mechanisms.
relationships: Principles are translated into rules by Policy Makers
Developers build and deploy AI Systems
AI Systems interact with and impact the Public
The Public provides feedback and experiences societal effects
Oversight Bodies audit systems and gather public feedback
Audit results and public feedback inform Policy Makers for Refined Policy
